title: PC feedback 001
review_text: In Skybound Frontier on PC, the combat finally clicked because parry timing is consistent and enemy wind-ups are readable. The boss rematch felt earned rather than lucky. This occurred after the June balance update on 2026-01-02.
owner_reply: Thanks for the detailed report. The team has linked this case to the relevant investigation.

title: PlayStation 5 feedback 002
review_text: In Iron Harbor on PlayStation 5, matchmaking repeatedly placed our new squad against coordinated high-rank teams. Two friends stopped queuing after three one-sided matches. This occurred after the June balance update on 2026-02-09.

title: Xbox Series X feedback 003
review_text: In Verdant Protocol on Xbox Series X, the game crashed during autosave after the chapter boss and corrupted the newest save slot. I lost nearly two hours of progress. This occurred after the June balance update on 2026-03-16.

title: Nintendo Switch feedback 004
review_text: In Echoes of Aster on Nintendo Switch, the accessibility menu lets me resize subtitles, reduce flashes, and remap every action. I could play comfortably without asking someone else to change files. This occurred after the June balance update on 2026-04-23.

title: PC feedback 005
review_text: In Skybound Frontier on PC, controller input starts lagging whenever the frame rate drops in the city hub. Dodges feel unresponsive during the busiest fights. This occurred during a four-player evening session on 2026-05-04.

title: PlayStation 5 feedback 006
review_text: In Iron Harbor on PlayStation 5, the companion dialogue reacts to earlier choices instead of repeating generic lines. The crew feels unusually believable. This occurred during a four-player evening session on 2026-06-11.

title: Xbox Series X feedback 007
review_text: In Verdant Protocol on Xbox Series X, the crafting screen hides required materials behind several nested tabs. I spend more time searching menus than planning upgrades. This occurred during a four-player evening session on 2026-01-18.

title: Nintendo Switch feedback 008
review_text: In Echoes of Aster on Nintendo Switch, die Steuerung reagiert präzise, weil Ausweichfenster und Treffer klar lesbar sind. Der höhere Schwierigkeitsgrad fühlt sich fair an. This occurred during a four-player evening session on 2026-02-25.

title: PC feedback 009
review_text: In Skybound Frontier on PC, los subtítulos son grandes, claros y muestran quién está hablando. Pude seguir la historia sin perder información. This occurred while returning after three months away on 2026-03-06.

title: PlayStation 5 feedback 010
review_text: In Iron Harbor on PlayStation 5, les objectifs restent lisibles même pendant les combats chargés. Je comprends toujours la prochaine décision importante. This occurred while returning after three months away on 2026-04-13.
owner_reply: Thanks for the detailed report. The team has linked this case to the relevant investigation.

title: Xbox Series X feedback 011
review_text: In Verdant Protocol on Xbox Series X, weapon audio changes clearly by distance and surface material. Finding enemies by sound feels precise and fair. This occurred while returning after three months away on 2026-05-20.

title: Nintendo Switch feedback 012
review_text: In Echoes of Aster on Nintendo Switch, text chat moderation misses repeated slurs even after several reports. Our group now avoids public lobbies. This occurred while returning after three months away on 2026-06-27.

title: PC feedback 013
review_text: In Skybound Frontier on PC, the latest patch reduced loading times from almost a minute to about fifteen seconds. Restarting missions is much less frustrating. This occurred on a fresh account with no prior unlocks on 2026-01-08.

title: PlayStation 5 feedback 014
review_text: In Iron Harbor on PlayStation 5, the map icons use very similar colors for quests and vendors. I keep walking to the wrong marker. This occurred on a fresh account with no prior unlocks on 2026-02-15.

title: Xbox Series X feedback 015
review_text: In Verdant Protocol on Xbox Series X, a disconnect at the extraction screen removed the mission rewards even though the server recorded completion. The twenty-minute run felt wasted. This occurred on a fresh account with no prior unlocks on 2026-03-22.

title: Nintendo Switch feedback 016
review_text: In Echoes of Aster on Nintendo Switch, the soundtrack becomes quieter during dialogue and returns smoothly afterward. Important story scenes remain easy to follow. This occurred on a fresh account with no prior unlocks on 2026-04-03.

title: PC feedback 017
review_text: In Skybound Frontier on PC, cross-play voice chat cuts out whenever a PlayStation player joins an Xbox party. Our mixed-platform team has to use a separate call. This occurred after the June balance update on 2026-05-10.

title: PlayStation 5 feedback 018
review_text: In Iron Harbor on PlayStation 5, die Verbindung bricht in Ranglistenmatches kurz vor dem Ende ab. Trotz vollständiger Runde verliere ich Punkte. This occurred after the June balance update on 2026-06-17.

title: Xbox Series X feedback 019
review_text: In Verdant Protocol on Xbox Series X, el emparejamiento tarda mucho y luego crea partidas con mucha diferencia de nivel. Nuestro grupo dejó de jugar competitivo. This occurred after the June balance update on 2026-01-24.
owner_reply: Thanks for the detailed report. The team has linked this case to the relevant investigation.

title: Nintendo Switch feedback 020
review_text: In Echoes of Aster on Nintendo Switch, le jeu se fige quand plusieurs effets apparaissent dans la zone centrale. Je rate des actions sans que ce soit une erreur de ma part. This occurred after the June balance update on 2026-02-05.

title: PC feedback 021
review_text: In Skybound Frontier on PC, the quest log says “search the eastern ruins” but gives no clue which of three regions it means. Exploration turns into checking a guide. This occurred during a four-player evening session on 2026-03-12.

title: PlayStation 5 feedback 022
review_text: In Iron Harbor on PlayStation 5, the anti-cheat update blocks the game on Linux before the main menu appears. A title I previously played is now inaccessible. This occurred during a four-player evening session on 2026-04-19.

title: Xbox Series X feedback 023
review_text: In Verdant Protocol on Xbox Series X, enemy factions fight each other and create unscripted openings. Repeated missions rarely unfold the same way. This occurred during a four-player evening session on 2026-05-26.

title: Nintendo Switch feedback 024
review_text: In Echoes of Aster on Nintendo Switch, camera shake returns to maximum after every restart even when it was disabled. Motion sickness makes longer sessions impossible. This occurred during a four-player evening session on 2026-06-07.
